channel.title: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
--> I'm using vercel with Frontity but initial server response time sometimes takes 3-4 seconds. ![image|690x239](upload://quW5M89iVIqAKmbQOt2FmsVbAMJ.png) ![image|690x163](upload://1Km0OLI2JFfEGlbUbzXTuioGi8w.png)
System info ```
## System: - OS: Windows 10 10.0.22000 - CPU: (12) x64 AMD Ryzen 5 5600X 6-Core Processor - Memory: 4.78 GB / 15.92 GB ## Binaries: - Node: 16.15.1 - C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.EXE - npm: 8.11.0 - C:\Program Files\nodejs\npm.CMD ## Browsers: - Chrome: Not Found - Edge: Spartan (44.22000.120.0), Chromium (101.0.1210.53) - Internet Explorer: 11.0.22000.120 ## npmPackages: - @frontity/core: ^1.16.0 => 1.16.0 - @frontity/google-analytics: ^1.4.1 => 1.4.1 - @frontity/google-tag-manager-analytics: ^1.3.0 => 1.3.0 - @frontity/head-tags: ^1.1.1 => 1.1.1 - @frontity/html2react: ^1.7.0 => 1.7.0 - @frontity/tiny-router: ^1.4.4 => 1.4.4 - @frontity/wp-comments: ^0.2.6 => 0.2.6 - @frontity/wp-source: ^1.11.7 => 1.11.7 - @frontity/yoast: ^2.1.1 => 2.1.1 - forgotten-developer: file:packages/forgotten-developer => 1.0.3 - frontity: ^1.17.2 => 1.17.2 - prismjs: ^1.28.0 => 1.28.0 - react-icons: ^4.4.0 => 4.4.0 - yarn: ^1.22.18 => 1.22.18 ## npmGlobalPackages: - frontity: Not Found - npx: Not Found
```
✓ A repository or codesandbox with the code of your project `- https://github.com/Divaksh/forgotten-developer/tree/dev`
✓ A deployed version of your site `http://divaksh.com/`
✓ The URL of your WP REST API `api.divaksh.com/wp-json`

item.title: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
item.dc:creator: carlitos.virreira
item.description:
I do not think that will change any time soon. We all have the same issue apparently.

Read full topic
item.source: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?

item.title: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
item.dc:creator: lmaclean
item.description:
I still don’t have a solution for this.

Read full topic
item.source: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?

item.title: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
item.dc:creator: carlitos.virreira
item.description:
I’m also interested in this thread. Get the same issues.

Read full topic
item.source: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?

item.title: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
item.dc:creator: lmaclean
item.description:
Have you looked into their documentation of stale-while-revalidate… Deploy to Vercel - Frontity Tutorial ?

I haven’t looked any further into it myself, but I did notice it while looking through their documentation on deploying with Vercel.

I have run into a similar server response time issue on my sites, but I haven’t had the time to investigate the solution for it yet.

Read full topic
item.source: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?

item.title: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
item.dc:creator: Divaksh
item.description:
I’m using vercel with Frontity but initial server response time sometimes takes 3-4 seconds.


System info


## System:
 - OS: Windows 10 10.0.22000
 - CPU: (12) x64 AMD Ryzen 5 5600X 6-Core Processor             
 - Memory: 4.78 GB / 15.92 GB
## Binaries:
 - Node: 16.15.1 - C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.EXE
 - npm: 8.11.0 - C:\Program Files\nodejs\npm.CMD
## Browsers:
 - Chrome: Not Found
 - Edge: Spartan (44.22000.120.0), Chromium (101.0.1210.53)
 - Internet Explorer: 11.0.22000.120
## npmPackages:
 - @frontity/core: ^1.16.0 => 1.16.0 
 - @frontity/google-analytics: ^1.4.1 => 1.4.1 
 - @frontity/google-tag-manager-analytics: ^1.3.0 => 1.3.0 
 - @frontity/head-tags: ^1.1.1 => 1.1.1 
 - @frontity/html2react: ^1.7.0 => 1.7.0 
 - @frontity/tiny-router: ^1.4.4 => 1.4.4 
 - @frontity/wp-comments: ^0.2.6 => 0.2.6 
 - @frontity/wp-source: ^1.11.7 => 1.11.7 
 - @frontity/yoast: ^2.1.1 => 2.1.1 
 - forgotten-developer: file:packages/forgotten-developer => 1.0.3 
 - frontity: ^1.17.2 => 1.17.2 
 - prismjs: ^1.28.0 => 1.28.0 
 - react-icons: ^4.4.0 => 4.4.0 
 - yarn: ^1.22.18 => 1.22.18 
## npmGlobalPackages:
 - frontity: Not Found
 - npx: Not Found

✓ A repository or codesandbox with the code of your project
- https://github.com/Divaksh/forgotten-developer/tree/dev

✓ A deployed version of your site
http://divaksh.com/

✓ The URL of your WP REST API
api.divaksh.com/wp-json

Read full topic
item.source: How to reduce initial server response time on Vercel?
